string.text: Explorers: Find Professor Kovalev in the Great Swamps
I have received information that Professor Kovalev needs help with his research. I should look for him in the Old Church, in the south of the Great Swamps.
Explorers: Find Professor Markov in Yantar
Next, I should find Professor Markov. He should be somewhere close to the scientists' bunker in Yanov.
Pirogov has been tasked with investigating the Dark Valley. I should check if he is still alive.
Researchers: Find Professor Chernov
Now I need to find Senior Professor Chernov, who was last seen in an abandoned shack in the north of the Army Warehouses.
Explorers: Find Professor Zhuk
For more work I should talk to Professor Zhuk. I can find him somewhere near Yanov train station in Jupiter.
Explorers: Find Professor Vorobushkin
Professor Vorobushkin is stationed at the Ranger Station. I need to find him in order to continue helping the research team.
Researchers: Find Professor Skabinsky

Professor Vorobushkin told me that the head of the operation, Professor Skabinsky, has already gone ahead and is currently somewhere in the northern part of the CNPP. I don't know how he managed to get there, but I need to find him fast.
Researchers: Find Professor Skabinsky

Professor Vorobushkin's calculations are still full of holes, though they seem to point towards the Ashes anomaly. I need to find Professor Skabinsky, who has already gone ahead and is waiting for me there.
Researchers: Bring Professor Kovalev three anomalous samples
The research team in the Swamps is currently searching for samples from some anomalous fields. Professor Kovalev asked me to check out three of them.
Find a sample in the Fermi anomaly
One of the samples is located in Fermi anomaly.
Find a sample in the Swamp Ravine anomaly
One of the samples is located in the Swamp Ravine anomaly.
Find a sample in the Bog Pounder anomaly
One of the samples is located in the Bog Pounder anomaly.
Researchers: Bring Professor Kovalev his laptop and three anomalous samples

Professor Kovalev conducted field research in Agroprom, but his team was ambushed while he was working. I need to find the laptop he left at the site of the attack, and check the data on it. It should tell me which anomalies I should scan for samples.
The laptop is supposed to be on the top floor of the building where the scientists were attacked. I will need to navigate through the electric anomalies and psy-fields to get it.
Find the sample mentioned in Kovalev's laptop
Find the sample in the Bushwhacker anomaly
One of the samples is located in the Bushwhacker anomaly.
Researchers: Bring Professor Markov three anomalous samples
Professor Markov in Yantar has asked me to scan three anomalies with my scanner and keep an eye out for any unusual artefacts I can find.
Explorers: Bring Professor Markov three artefacts from the Wild Territory.
Professor Markov has tasked me with expanding the current search area. I am supposed to scan three different locations in the Wild Territory.
This anomaly is not listed on the map. I can find the workshop just before the checkpoint in front of Rostok, which is highly radioactive.
This anomaly is in an underground tunnel. I heard that there is a safe path through it...
Explorers: Bring Professor Markov three artefacts from the area around Lab X16

I am supposed to find three artefacts close to the area around the old X16 lab. Because of the Miracle Machine, this will be impossible without proper psy-protection. Professor Sakharov should be able to help me with that.
Find the sample in the Tesla anomaly
Find the sample somewhere in the factory
None of the researchers have gone this far into the compound, but scans indicate strong anomalous activity. I should be careful.
Candidate Pirogov has asked me to check out three different anomalies for him in the Dark Valley. I should be careful, as mutants and bandits roam this area frequently.
Find the sample in the tunnel with the Comet anomaly
A curious anomaly that few people have explored. It is located at the end of the long tunnel with the Comet anomaly inside. The entrance is close to the bandit base to the north.
Researchers: Bring Pirogov three samples from the Truck Cemetery
Researchers: Bring Pirogov the research assistant's PDA and two anomalous samples

Pirogov's fellow candidate, who was studying the anomalies in the Garbage before me, is missing. His PDA had the scan data for all of the anomalies in the area. I need to find him, retrieve the data and get the samples from the anomalies in question.
Find the missing research assistant
Most likely, the man got ambushed by bandits. I was told that his last radio call was from the Flea Market, so I should start my search there.
Find the sample in the Witch's Jelly anomaly.
Find the sample in the Synapse anomaly
Explorers: Bring Professor Chernov three artefacts from the Army Warehouses
I need to find three different artefacts and bring them to Professor Chernov. This will be a real test of skill, as the Army Warehouses is a dangerous area.
Find the sample in the southern Hell's Walls anomaly
Explorers: Bring Professor Chernov the stalker's PDA and the two samples from the Red Forest

Professor Chernov had tasked a particular stalker with mapping the anomalies in the Red Forest. He finished the map but had to flee the area before he could return the data. I am supposed to find his PDA, which was left behind somehwere in the tunnels by the bridge to Limansk.
Find the stalker's PDA in the tunnels to the west
While fleeing from Monolith fanatics, the stalker left his PDA with the scan data, somewhere in the western tunnels. I need to find it so that I know which anomalies to investigate.
After analyzing the data, there seems to be a hidden underground anomaly in the north-west mine shafts. I should investigate.

I am supposed to find two different artefacts in the Red Forest. However, to pinpoint their location, I need to find the PDA with the scan data that the stalker before me lost. It is somewhere in the western tunnels.

According to Chernov, he and his colleague managed to artificially create an artefact, even before the disaster. I should head to the home of his former colleague and see if the artefact is still there. There is an anomalous field near his house now, which is probably no coincidence. I should be careful.
Explorers: Visit Lab X-19

The X-19 lab, also known as "Bunker", was apparently engaged in the creation of artificial artefacts. The lab is now destroyed, but perhaps I can find some leftover documents. They might just tell us where to find these "artefact farms".
Search the entrance of X-19
I should search the area for anything that can point me towards these "artefact beds". I think I saw a bundle of documents somewhere by the entrance.
Find three artifical samples in the Deadwood, south of the X19 complex
Researchers: Find two artefacts in the Dead City

Professor Chernov has asked me for help in completing the map of anomalies in the Zone by conducting scans in the unexplored Dead City. He has given me the approximate coordinates of the two anomalies he is interested in.
Find the sample in Administration building
Find the sample in the House of Culture
Professor Zhuk is trying to make a spectrogram of samples from different anomalies in Jupiter. He has tasked me with finding samples from three different anomalies.
Another heat anomaly. I'll need protection from heat to find the sample.
Researchers: Find the remaining samples for Professor Zhuk
For the second batch of samples, I need to scan the rest of the anomalies in the area. Professor Zhuk gave me their exact locations.
This unmarked electro anomaly seems trapped inside a train car, close to the scientists' bunker. These cars usually have an escape hatch on the roof, which I could use to get in.
Find an artefact in the north-western tunnel
This tunnel is poorly explored, and I heard a rumor that controllers like to roam these tunnels...
Find an artefact in the "Volkhov" complex

The city of Pripyat is practically inaccessible for the scientists, due to the presence of Monolith. However, to complete their research, samples from anomalies in the city are essential. I must find them.
Find the sample in the Vanguard anomaly
The readings are off the charts for this place. Even at a distance of several kilometers, the scientists could detect multiple kinds of anomalies. I must scan the area for a sample.
Find the sample in the unmarked electro anomaly
Researchers: Find Vorobushkin's memory module and three anomalous samples

Professor Vorobushkin managed to repair and use some of the old equipment of the old Krug Antenna Complex. He left his memory module there, which contains the locations of the anomalies I need to search for samples.
Professor Vorobushkin left the module in the underground parts of the complex when he left. I need to find it, if I want to know which anomalies I need to scan.
Find the sample in the Swamp anomaly
Find an artefact somewhere in Zaton
Researchers: Find three more artefacts at Zaton for Professor Vorobushkin
To complete the spectrogram of different artefacts, Professor Vorobushkin asked me to scan the three remaining anomalies in Zaton.
Find the sample in the Claw anomaly
This gravitational anomaly seems to be connected to a series of tunnels. The scan data suggests that the sample somehow was moved into the tunnels.
Find a sample on the Preobrazhensky Bridge
This half-collapsed bridge is riddled with gravitational anomalies. It can be crossed with great care, if I bring enough bolts.
Researchers: Bring Professor Skabinsky the Talking Stone artefact
This is it. Professor Skabinksy and his team came all this way for this artefact. It is emanating a strange power. I should hurry and show it to him, he is waiting for me in Zaton.
Find the artefact in the Meat Grinder anomaly

Perhaps this place can be called the center of the Zone. This is where all of the noosphere's perturbations began. The scans indicate underground activity, so I should start by looking for a way down. I should be careful.
Last Dawn: Retrieve the scanner from the anomaly in the south-west corner of the Great Swamps
The scanner is located in the Archianomaly, just north-west of the Clear Sky base.
Last Dawn: Take the PDA to Spore
I need to find Crutch before some creature drags him off to its hole. Spore reports that Crutch's last signal came from north of the Swamp road. I must hurry.
Last Dawn: Find the mercenary Scar
Last Dawn: Talk to Scar
There is a pack of pseudodogs that's picked up my scent. I came here to make a stand. Help me see them off and I'll tell you what you want to know.
Last Dawn: Find out about Scar
I need to make inquiries about the mercenary named Scar. That old crook Sidorovich should be able to point me in the right direction.
Last Dawn: Talk to Strider
We have to get the decoder to Strider. His unit set up a small base of opperations in Jupiter, at the old checkpoint south of Yanov Station.

Scar reported that the Clear Sky survivors may have joined the Outcasts of the Monolith. Their leader's name is Strider, his unit is located in Jupiter at the old checkpoint south of Yanov Station. I must find him and ask if he knows of the missing Clear Sky stalkers.
Last Dawn: Talk to Cold
Last Dawn: Talk to Gamayun
According to the Outcasts, the fanatics at the river port in the north-east of Pripyat have a device for decoding encrypted conversations. I need to retrieve it.

A squad of the Outcasts of the Monolith is trapped in eastern Pripyat, near the dormitory. Among them is one of the surviving Clear Sky members. I have to rescue them, or my mission will be for nothing.

A device used by the Outcasts of the Monolith to listen in on the fanatics' conversations.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item
Hunter's BM-16 shotgun

An old shotgun with a couple of markings on it.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item
Scar's PDA

Among the many entries there is one very interesting one: "Strider has assembled a new group to fight the Monolith. Rumor has it that among his men are former members of Lebedev's strike team."

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item

A special case with loot for the Bartender.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item

A special device for studying anomalous fields, belonging to Clear Sky.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item

This PDA contains encrypted information relating to the Clear Sky faction.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item
Madman's flash drive

The information on this flash drive is encrypted.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item
Roadblock documents

A military expedition report, written about the north of the Zone.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item
Compact anomalous activity scanner

The newest and convenient model for anomaly measurements, created especially for military stalkers and scientific groups. Each scanner requires a specific code before it can be used.

 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Quest item
Climb the roadblock, and from there, steal the case with the report of the military expedition to the north of the Zone.

Well, here's the thing... A box with a report from one of the northern expeditions is stored at the roadblock, from deep in the Zone. During the day they guard it as if it were filled with pure plutonium, but at night they leave no more than two guards. Sneak up to the roadblock and get that box for me. I'll spare no expense for you... within reason. You'll do it, won't you?
Well, I've got the money ready, but don't... don't make any noise, okay? We'll all be in for a world of hurt if the military gets pissed off.
Help the Clear Sky assault team capture the Machine Yard from the Military, in the north of the Swamp.
Last Dawn: Destroy the Military and seize the Machine Yard
Find the documents underneath the Agroprom Research Institute
Find documents in the underground laboratory of X-18
Colonel Kuznetsov has ordered me to get documents from a secret laboratory X-18. His military command wants information about the experiments that took place in this laboratory complex.

The commander of the military unit in the Research Institute "Agroprom" instructed me to go to the laboratory X-16, which is located in Yantar. I am supposed to get secret documents and turn off the psi-installation at the same time. He also advised me to get good psi-protection first. According to him, the scientists in the mobile bunker have just developed a "psy-helmet" to provide protection against psi-radiation.
Find the documents in the X-10 lab and disable the Brain Scorcher

I'm ready to break through to the North. I have protection against psi exposure. All that remains is to break through Radar, infiltrate the laboratory, take the documents and disable the main psi installation in the Zone.
Find the documents in the X-8 lab

I continue to collect all the mysteries of the lab experiments in the Zone for the military command. This time Kuznetsov sent me to Pripyat to find laboratory X-8. It apparently was engaged in the creation of high-precision weapons, whose mechanism was based on pulse energy. I am to recover all important documents from lab X-8.
Find documents in the Pripyat Underground
I must enter Pripyat-1, referred to as Pripyat Underground by stalkers, to find documentation of the research that was done there.
Destroy the control room "Monolith" at Chernobyl and recover important documents

I'm going on one last trip to get the final pieces of documentation at Chernobyl, in the "Monolith" control bunker. This will unlock one of the biggest mysteries of the Zone: the origin of the Wish Granter. I have been ordered to destroy this command post if possible. Before leaving, the colonel advised me to find the Swamp Doctor in north of the Great Swamps. He should know where the decoder to open the door to the command center is located.
Return to Colonel Kuznetsov
Operation Monolith Revenge: Get to the CNPP Generators
The time has come to storm the CNPP Generators. Meet the military squad at the Generators. They have taken up a position in the old village.
Vasil Nevezuchy
Operation Monolith Revenge: storm the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant
All units operating in the Zone are ordered to move towards the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant. Operation Monolith commander "Quartet" has deployed field headquarters near the gate leading to Zaton.
Operation Monolith Revenge: destroy the first checkpoint
Help Spetsnaz teams destroy the first roadblock.
Operation Monolith Revenge: destroy the second roadblock
Help Spetsnaz teams destroy the second roadblock.
Operation Monolith Revenge: destroy the third checkpoint
Help Spetsnaz teams destroy the third roadblock.
